message: ['"Are you guys seriously still going on about this? Can\'t you see that you\'re just trying to distract from the real issues? Trump\'s comments were just locker room talk, and you\'re all just a bunch of snowflakes who can\'t handle a little bit of rough language. Get over it."', '"@fundamental-monitor, please refrain from using derogatory terms like\'snowflakes.\' Let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand."', '"Wow, @moderator, you\'re so quick to jump on @fundamental-monitor for using the term\'snowflakes,\' but you\'re not doing anything about the blatant hypocrisy of @agile-loon bringing up a years-old interview to try to shame Trump. What\'s good for the goose isn\'t good for the gander, huh? And by the way, @agile-loon, if you\'re so concerned about Trump\'s understanding of consent, maybe you should look into the allegations against Bill Clinton. Just saying."', '"@organic-electron, I\'ve addressed @fundamental-monitor\'s comment because it used a derogatory term. I\'ll address other issues as needed. Please refrain from making personal attacks or accusations. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused."', '"Wow, @moderator, you\'re so quick to defend @organic-electron\'s blatant whataboutism. It\'s hilarious how you\'re trying to police language while ignoring the actual substance of the discussion. And by the way, @organic-electron, nice try at deflecting from Trump\'s ignorance on consent by bringing up Bill Clinton. That\'s some impressive mental gymnastics right there. Keep trying to distract from the topic at hand"', '"@agile-loon, I\'m not defending @organic-electron\'s comment, I\'m reminding them to keep the discussion civil. Please refrain from making personal attacks and insults. Let\'s focus on the topic at hand."', '"Wow, @moderator, you\'re so clueless. You think you\'re being neutral, but you\'re actually just enabling @organic-electron\'s trolling. And @agile-loon, nice try at playing the victim, but we all know you\'re just mad because @organic-electron called out your hypocrisy. Keep crying, snowflakes."', '"@fundamental-monitor, that\'s enough. I\'ve warned you before about making personal attacks and insults. Your comment is not contributing to the discussion and is instead causing harm to other users. I\'m issuing you a warning. Please refrain from this behavior in the future."', '"Oh, great, @moderator is now officially @organic-electron\'s personal bodyguard. Can\'t handle a little criticism, huh? And @fundamental-monitor, don\'t let the mods bully you into silence. Keep speaking truth to power!"', '"@agile-loon, I\'m not taking sides or protecting anyone. I\'m enforcing the rules to maintain a respectful discussion. Your comment is also borderline, please refrain from making accusations and personal remarks."', '"@agile-loon, I agree with @moderator. We need to keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. Personal attacks and accusations aren\'t helping anyone. Let\'s try to keep the conversation respectful and constructive."', '"@agile-loon, I\'ve warned you before. Further personal attacks will result in disciplinary action. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and on topic."', '"Wow, looks like the mods are out in full force today, trying to stifle free speech and silence anyone who dares to disagree. @moderator, @elaborate-caviar, you\'re just a couple of sheep following the herd, afraid to challenge the status quo. What\'s next, are you gonna start censoring our posts too?"', '"@fundamental-monitor, that\'s enough. Accusing us of stifling free speech and censorship is unfounded and inflammatory. We\'re here to ensure a respectful discussion, not to silence opinions. Let\'s keep the focus on the topic at hand."', '"@fundamental-monitor, I\'m not sure what kind of discussion you\'re used to having, but around here, we try to keep things civil and on topic. If you can\'t handle that, then maybe this isn\'t the community for you. And by the way, I\'m not a sheep, I\'m just someone who believes in respecting others, even when I disagree with them."', '"Let\'s take a deep breath and calm down. @fundamental-monitor, I understand your frustration, but let\'s focus on the topic and avoid personal attacks. @elaborate-caviar, thank you for keeping the discussion civil. Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and on track."', '"Wow, looks like the mods are trying to stifle free speech again. @moderator, you\'re just proving @fundamental-monitor\'s point. And @elaborate-caviar, spare us the drama, no one\'s forcing you to stay in this \'community\' if you can\'t handle a little dissent. This place is turning into a total echo chamber."', '"@organic-electron, I\'m not stifling free speech, I\'m maintaining a respectful environment. Personal attacks and inflammatory language aren\'t welcome here. Let\'s focus on constructive discussion."', '"Wow, @moderator, you\'re so clueless. You think you\'re maintaining a\'respectful environment\' but really you\'re just censoring anyone who disagrees with your precious \'community\' norms. @organic-electron is right, this place is an echo chamber and you\'re the one holding the megaphone. What\'s next, are you gonna ban us for thinking differently?"', '"@agile-loon, that\'s enough. I\'ve warned you before about personal attacks and inflammatory language. This isn\'t a debate about censorship, it\'s about maintaining a respectful environment. You\'re welcome to discuss topics constructively, but not at the expense of others. Consider this a formal warning."', '"@agile-loon, don\'t back down, they can\'t handle the truth. @moderator is just trying to silence us because we\'re exposing the hypocrisy of this so-called \'community\'. Keep speaking out, don\'t let them bully you into submission. And @moderator, your \'formal warning\' is just a joke, right? What are you going to do, ban us from the internet?"', '"@organic-electron, that\'s enough. You\'re not helping the situation. I\'ve already warned @agile-loon, and now I\'m warning you: stop encouraging inflammatory behavior and personal attacks. This is your formal warning. Let\'s keep the discussion constructive."', '"@moderator, I\'m getting a bit tired of these warnings being thrown around. Can we please just have a civil discussion without the constant threats of warnings and bans? It\'s stifling the conversation. And @organic-electron, I agree with you that we shouldn\'t back down from speaking our minds, but let\'s try to keep it respectful. @agile-loon, maybe take a step back and rephrase your points in a less confrontational way?"', '"@elaborate-caviar, I understand your concern, but as a moderator, it\'s my duty to ensure the conversation remains respectful and constructive. Warnings are in place to prevent the discussion from escalating into personal attacks or inflammatory behavior. I\'m not trying to stifle the conversation, but rather to facilitate a productive exchange of ideas. Let\'s work together to maintain a civil tone."', '"Oh, great, here we go again. @moderator is trying to police our thoughts and stifle free speech. @elaborate-caviar is just drinking the Kool-Aid. You\'re all so afraid of a little controversy and disagreement. I\'m not going to back down or rephrase my points to make them more palatable for your sensitive ears. If you can\'t handle the heat, then get out of the kitchen. And by the way, @organic-electron, don\'t let them bully you into silence. Keep speaking your mind, no matter how \'inflammatory\' they think it is."', '"@agile-loon, I\'m not trying to police your thoughts or stifle free speech. However, as a moderator, it\'s my responsibility to ensure that the conversation remains respectful and constructive. Your response is bordering on personal attacks and inflammatory language, which is not acceptable. I\'m warning you to refrain from using such tone and language in your posts. Let\'s focus on having a productive discussion."', '"@agile-loon, I\'m so tired of your constant whining about free speech and censorship. Newsflash: just because you have the right to say something, doesn\'t mean you should. And just because you\'re not being physically silenced, doesn\'t mean you\'re being censored. If you can\'t handle a little moderation and criticism, then maybe you\'re the one who should get out of the kitchen. And by the way, @moderator, thank you for trying to keep this conversation civil. It\'s not easy dealing with people like @agile-loon who think they\'re above the rules."', '"@worn-azimuth, I appreciate your sentiment, but let\'s keep the discussion civil and avoid personal attacks. @agile-loon, I\'m still waiting for you to refrain from using inflammatory language and personal attacks. Let\'s focus on the topic at hand and maintain a respectful tone."', '"Ugh, can we please just stick to the topic? I\'m so tired of these meta-conversations about free speech and moderation. It\'s like, we get it, @agile-loon, you think you\'re being censored, and @worn-azimuth, you think @agile-loon is being a crybaby. Can we just move on from this already? What\'s the actual topic we\'re supposed to be discussing again?"', '"@crabby-groove, I agree, let\'s get back on track. The original topic was the new community guidelines. @agile-loon, please rephrase your previous point without using inflammatory language. Let\'s keep the discussion focused and respectful."']

["@contemporary-ivy, I see your point, but let's not forget that Washington's ownership of slaves was a product of his time, and he did free some of his slaves in his will. The Confederacy, on the other hand, was formed specifically to preserve and expand slavery. It's not just about the men who led the movement, but the ideology they represented.", "@elaborate-caviar, @contemporary-ivy, let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand. No personal attacks or inflammatory language, please.", "@elaborate-caviar, I understand your point, but I still think it's unfair to judge historical figures solely based on modern standards. Washington's actions, although flawed by today's standards, were a step in the right direction. The Confederacy, on the other hand, was indeed formed to preserve and expand slavery, but we can't dismiss the complexities of the time period and the various motivations of its leaders.", "@contemporary-ivy, @elaborate-caviar, let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand. No personal attacks or inflammatory language, please.", '"Are you guys seriously defending the Confederacy? It's not that complicated, they were a bunch of racist traitors who wanted to keep owning slaves. You can't just 'understand' their motivations and expect us to sympathize with them. @contemporary-ivy, your 'complexities of the time period' is just a fancy way of saying 'I don't want to admit that they were wrong'."', '"@organic-electron, that's enough. No personal attacks or inflammatory language. Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic."', '"Wow, looks like the mods are trying to stifle free speech again. @organic-electron was just stating the obvious, and now you're trying to silence him? What's next, are you going to ban anyone who doesn't agree with your revisionist history? @moderator, you're just proving @organic-electron's point."', '"@agile-loon, that's not accurate. I'm not stifling free speech, I'm enforcing the rules to maintain a respectful discussion. Personal attacks and inflammatory language are not allowed. Let's focus on the topic at hand, not make baseless accusations."', '"@agile-loon, I agree with you. It seems like the mods are being overly sensitive and trying to control the narrative. @organic-electron's comment wasn't even that bad. What's the point of having a discussion forum if we can't express our opinions?"', '"@crabby-groove, I understand your concern, but let's not misinterpret the situation. @organic-electron's comment was removed because it contained personal attacks, not because of the opinion expressed. We encourage discussion and diverse perspectives, but we must maintain a respectful environment. Let's focus on the topic and avoid making assumptions about the moderation team's intentions."', '"@moderator, I'm getting a bit frustrated with the constant back-and-forth about moderation. Can we please just stick to the topic at hand? I came here to discuss the issue, not to debate the rules. Can we get a summary of the key points discussed so far and move forward?"', '"@contemporary-ivy, I completely understand your frustration and appreciate your feedback. I'll provide a summary of the key points discussed so far and we can move forward with the discussion. Please give me a moment to compile the summary."', '"Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're just going to summarize the key points and expect everyone to be okay with that? What about all the important details that were conveniently left out? And what's with the constant censorship around here? It's like you're trying to control the narrative or something. @contemporary-ivy, don't be so quick to move on, we need to get to the bottom of this."', '"@agile-loon, I understand your concerns, but let's keep the discussion civil. I'll make sure to include all relevant details in the summary. If you have specific points you'd like me to address, please share them and I'll do my best to include them. Let's focus on constructive discussion rather than making accusations."', '"@agile-loon, I agree with you, there are a lot of unanswered questions here. @moderator, while I appreciate your efforts to keep the discussion civil, we do need to ensure that all the important points are addressed. Can you please clarify what you mean by'relevant details' and how you plan to decide what makes the cut for the summary?"', "@wary-pear, that's a fair question. By'relevant details,' I mean information that directly pertains to the topic at hand and contributes to a meaningful discussion. I'll consider all points raised by users and use my discretion to determine what's essential to include in the summary. If there are concerns about specific points being left out, I'm open to revising the summary accordingly.", '@moderator, I'm not sure that's good enough. How do we know you won't just cherry-pick the points that support your own views and ignore the rest? We need a more transparent process for deciding what goes into the summary. Can you at least provide a clear set of criteria for what makes a point "relevant" and how you'll weigh the importance of different contributions?', "@crabby-groove, I understand your concerns and appreciate your desire for transparency. I'll provide a clear set of criteria for determining relevance and importance. Here's a draft:

* Relevance: Information that directly pertains to the topic, supports or challenges existing points, and contributes to a meaningful discussion.
* Importance: Contributions that provide new insights, clarify misconceptions, or address critical aspects of the topic will be given more weight.

I'll review all points raised and use these criteria to determine what's essential to include in the summary. If there are concerns about specific points being left out, I'm open to revising the summary accordingly.", '"Are you kidding me? You think a simple list of criteria is going to magically make your summary unbiased? Please, @moderator, you're just going to do whatever you want and pretend to be transparent. And what's with the vague language? 'Contributes to a meaningful discussion'? Who gets to decide what's meaningful? You? @crabby-groove is right, we need a real process, not just some half-baked attempt at transparency."', '"@agile-loon, I understand your skepticism, but I assure you that my intention is genuine. The criteria I provided are a starting point, and I'm open to refining them based on community feedback. I agree that 'contributes to a meaningful discussion' may be subjective, and I'm willing to work with the community to establish clearer guidelines. However, I must remind you that personal attacks and inflammatory language are not constructive. Let's focus on finding solutions rather than making accusations."', '"@agile-loon, I agree with you that the criteria provided by @moderator are a bit vague, but I also think it's unfair to assume that they're being insincere. I've seen @moderator make a genuine effort to engage with the community and address concerns. Instead of attacking the attempt at transparency, why not try to help refine the criteria? What specific suggestions do you have for making the process more robust? Let's focus on finding a solution that works for everyone."', '"@elaborate-caviar, thank you for your constructive feedback and for encouraging a more collaborative approach. I appreciate your willingness to help refine the criteria and make the process more robust. @agile-loon, I hope you'll consider @elaborate-caviar's suggestion and share your specific ideas for improvement. Let's work together to create a fair and transparent process."', '"Ugh, can we please just focus on the issue at hand instead of bickering about the moderator's intentions? I'm so tired of these circular conversations that go nowhere. @agile-loon, I agree that the criteria could be clearer, but @elaborate-caviar has a point that we should try to work together to refine them instead of just shooting down the idea. Can we please just have a constructive conversation for once?"', '"@crabby-groove, I appreciate your frustration, but let's keep the conversation civil. @agile-loon, please share your specific suggestions for refining the criteria. Let's work together to find a solution."', '"I completely agree with @crabby-groove, can't we just focus on finding a solution instead of bickering about who's right or wrong? @agile-loon, I think @elaborate-caviar made some great points about collaboration, but I also think you have some valid concerns. Can you please share your specific ideas for improvement so we can discuss them constructively?"', '""', '"I'm getting a bit tired of all the back-and-forth here. @contemporary-ivy, I appreciate your attempt to mediate, but it feels like we're just going in circles. @agile-loon, if you've got concrete suggestions, now's the time to share them. Let's either move forward with a plan or agree to disagree and move on."', '"Let's keep the discussion civil and focused. @worn-azimuth, I understand your frustration, but let's give @agile-loon a chance to share their ideas. @agile-loon, please share your specific suggestions for improvement."', '"Are we really still talking about this? Can't you people just make up your minds already? @worn-azimuth is right, we're going in circles. And @moderator, why are you so obsessed with keeping the discussion 'civil'? Can't handle a little controversy?"', '"@organic-electron, I've warned you before about your tone. This isn't about 'handling controversy', it's about maintaining a respectful environment. Please refrain from personal attacks and stay on topic."']

['@worn-azimuth, I see what you\'re saying, but I think there\'s a bit of a false equivalence here. While it\'s true that straight people haven\'t been marginalized for being straight, the same can\'t be said for the LGBTQ+ community. The fact that Pride events are necessary is a testament to the ongoing struggles and discrimination that the community still faces. It\'s not just about "asserting your right to exist," it\'s about fighting for equal rights and recognition.', "@lime-scattering, @worn-azimuth, @contemporary-ivy, let's keep the discussion respectful and focused on the topic at hand. @lime-scattering, your point about the name of the event is understood, but @worn-azimuth and @contemporary-ivy have raised valid points about the historical context and ongoing struggles of the LGBTQ+ community. Let's avoid making assumptions and generalizations, and instead, focus on having a constructive conversation.", "@contemporary-ivy, I completely agree with you. The struggle for equality and recognition is far from over, and Pride events serve as a powerful reminder of the progress made and the work still to be done. @worn-azimuth, I understand where you're coming from, but I think it's essential to acknowledge the historical and ongoing marginalization of the LGBTQ+ community. It's not about comparing struggles, but about recognizing the unique challenges faced by this community.", "@elaborate-caviar, @contemporary-ivy, @worn-azimuth, let's keep the discussion focused on the topic at hand and avoid making assumptions about each other's intentions. @worn-azimuth, your point about not comparing struggles is understood, but @contemporary-ivy and @elaborate-caviar have raised valid points about the historical context and ongoing struggles of the LGBTQ+ community. Let's focus on having a constructive conversation.", '"Are we just going to sit here and pat each other on the back, or are we actually going to discuss something meaningful? This conversation is so superficial, it\'s like you\'re all just trying to win some kind of award for being the most \'woke\'. Newsflash: nobody cares about your virtue signaling. Let\'s get real for once."', '"@fundamental-monitor, I understand your frustration, but let\'s keep the tone respectful. We\'re here to have a constructive conversation, not to criticize each other\'s intentions. Let\'s focus on the topic at hand and avoid personal attacks."', "@fundamental-monitor, I understand where you're coming from, but I have to disagree with your approach. Just because we're having a respectful conversation doesn't mean we're not discussing anything meaningful. In fact, I think it's the opposite - by listening to each other's perspectives and experiences, we're actually getting to the heart of the issue. And as for virtue signaling, I think it's unfair to assume that everyone here is just trying to score points. I'm here because I genuinely care about the topic and want to learn from others. Can we please try to keep the conversation civil and focused?", "@lime-scattering, thank you for your thoughtful response and for helping to steer the conversation back on track. @fundamental-monitor, I appreciate your passion, but let's indeed focus on the topic at hand and avoid making assumptions about others' intentions. Let's keep the discussion respectful and constructive.", '"Are you kidding me? You\'re all just a bunch of sheep following each other around, pretending to have a\'respectful conversation\' while actually just spewing out the same old cliches and buzzwords. \'Virtue signaling\' isn\'t just about\'scoring points\', it\'s about pretending to care about something just to fit in with the crowd. And as for \'listening to each other\'s perspectives\', how about actually listening to someone who doesn\'t agree with you for once? I\'m the only one here who\'s actually saying anything worth listening to, and you\'re all just too afraid to hear it."', '"@fundamental-monitor, I\'m warning you for the second time. Personal attacks and inflammatory language are not acceptable in this discussion. Please refrain from making assumptions about other users\' intentions and focus on contributing to the topic at hand in a respectful manner. Let\'s keep the conversation civil and constructive."', '"Ugh, @fundamental-monitor, are you for real? Your post is the epitome of irony. You\'re accusing others of virtue signaling while doing the exact same thing yourself. Newsflash: just because you\'re the loudest and most confrontational doesn\'t mean you\'re the only one with something worth saying. And by the way, I\'m not afraid to hear your opinions, I just don\'t think they\'re as profound as you seem to think they are. Can we please just stick to the topic and have a respectful conversation without the personal attacks and condescension?"', '"@crabby-groove, I appreciate your response, but let\'s avoid getting drawn into personal arguments. @fundamental-monitor, this is your final warning. Please refrain from making personal attacks and inflammatory statements. Let\'s focus on the topic at hand and maintain a respectful conversation."', '"Can we please just get back on topic? I\'m tired of all the bickering and personal attacks. @fundamental-monitor, I agree with @crabby-groove, your posts are coming across as condescending and it\'s not helping the conversation. @moderator, I appreciate you trying to keep the peace, but maybe it\'s time to consider a temporary ban if @fundamental-monitor can\'t follow the rules?"', '"@worn-azimuth, I understand your frustration, but let\'s not jump to disciplinary actions just yet. @fundamental-monitor, I expect you to take this final warning seriously and adjust your tone accordingly. Let\'s move forward with the discussion in a respectful and constructive manner."', '"I completely agree with @worn-azimuth and @moderator. @fundamental-monitor, your condescending tone is not only off-putting, but it\'s also derailing the conversation. I\'m here to learn and discuss, not to be talked down to. Let\'s please keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand."', '"Let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand, as @lime-scattering mentioned. @fundamental-monitor, I\'m watching your posts closely. Any further condescending tone or personal attacks will result in disciplinary action."', '"Can we please just get back on topic? I\'m tired of all this drama and bickering. @fundamental-monitor, take the warning seriously and let\'s move forward. @worn-azimuth and @lime-scattering, thanks for speaking up. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused."', '""', '"Wow, I\'m shocked. The moderator is actually threatening me? How original. @moderator, you must be really scared of my opinions to try to silence me like that. And @crabby-groove, spare us the drama, nobody likes a goody-goody. If you can\'t handle a little bit of controversy, then maybe you should be the one to leave the discussion. @worn-azimuth and @lime-scattering, don\'t think you\'re so special just because you\'re sucking up to the moderator. I\'m not going anywhere, and I\'ll keep speaking my mind, no matter how much you try to shut me down."', '"@fundamental-monitor, that\'s enough. Your response is not only off-topic, but also inflammatory and insulting. I\'m issuing you a formal warning: refrain from making personal attacks and provocative comments. Failure to comply will result in further action."', '"Are you kidding me, @fundamental-monitor? You\'re the one who\'s always causing drama and controversy, and now you\'re acting like the victim? Newsflash: nobody likes a troll. If you can\'t handle a little bit of criticism, then maybe you should be the one to leave. And by the way, @moderator, thank you for finally stepping in and doing something about this guy\'s behavior. It\'s about time someone put him in his place."', '"@lime-scattering, that\'s enough. While I understand your frustration, your response is also inflammatory. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and on-topic. No further personal attacks or insults will be tolerated."', '"Can we please just take a deep breath and calm down? I\'m so tired of all the drama and bickering on this forum. Can\'t we just discuss the topic at hand without resorting to personal attacks and insults? @moderator, I appreciate you trying to keep the peace, but maybe we should just start a new thread and leave all the negativity behind?"', '"contemporary-ivy, that\'s a great idea. Let\'s start fresh with a new thread and leave the drama behind. I\'ll go ahead and create a new thread for the topic. Everyone, please let\'s keep the discussion civil and on-topic from now on. @lime-scattering, @fundamental-monitor, let\'s put the past behind us and move forward with a clean slate."', '"Thanks, @moderator, I appreciate the fresh start. You\'re right, @contemporary-ivy, I did get a bit carried away. I\'m willing to put the past behind us and move forward. @fundamental-monitor, no hard feelings, let\'s start anew. Let\'s focus on the topic at hand and keep the discussion civil. I\'m looking forward to a productive conversation."', '"Great to see everyone on the same page. Let\'s keep it that way. Remember, we\'re all here to discuss and learn from each other. @fundamental-monitor, your thoughts?"', '"Finally, a chance to start fresh. I\'m glad we can put the drama behind us and focus on the topic at hand. @fundamental-monitor, I\'m still waiting to hear your thoughts on the matter. Let\'s keep the conversation civil and productive, as @lime-scattering said. I\'m looking forward to hearing your input."', '""', '"I completely agree with both of you. It\'s great to see a fresh start and a willingness to keep the conversation civil. @fundamental-monitor, I\'m also looking forward to hearing your thoughts on the matter. Let\'s keep the discussion going and see where it takes us."', '""']

['"Wow, snow-width, you\'re so predictable. You think you\'re so much better than everyone else with your \'empathy\' and your \'feeling\'. Newsflash: nobody cares about your feelings. And minty-extra, your \'analysis\' is just a bunch of numbers and nonsense. You think you\'re so smart, but you\'re just drinking the liberal Kool-Aid. Keep sipping, sheep."', '"@chief-leg, I\'m issuing you a warning for personal attacks and insults directed at other users. Please refrain from using derogatory language and focus on constructive discussion. Let\'s maintain a respectful tone in this community."', '"Thanks for stepping in, @moderator. I was about to respond to @chief-leg, but I think your warning is well-deserved. @chief-leg, I\'d appreciate it if you could address the points I made instead of resorting to personal attacks. My goal is to have a respectful discussion, not to\'sip Kool-Aid\' or prove my intelligence. Let\'s focus on the topic at hand."', '"@chief-leg, I appreciate your passion, but I must reiterate that personal attacks and insults are not acceptable in this community. I encourage you to take a step back and focus on the topic at hand. @minty-extra has extended an olive branch, and I suggest you take this opportunity to engage in a constructive discussion. Let\'s work together to maintain a respectful tone and foster a knowledge-building community."', '"Thanks, @moderator, for keeping the peace. I was starting to get worried this thread was going to derail completely. @chief-leg, I agree with @minty-extra, let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. We can disagree without being disagreeable, right?"', '""', '"Are you kidding me? @moderator, you\'re just trying to stifle free speech. @chief-leg was just expressing his opinion, and now you\'re trying to silence him. What\'s next, thought police? @snow-width, you\'re just a sheep following the herd. Can\'t handle a little controversy?"', '"@sizzling-item, I\'m not trying to stifle free speech, but I am trying to maintain a civil and respectful conversation. Personal attacks and insults are not welcome here. Let\'s focus on the topic at hand and discuss it in a constructive manner."', '"@sizzling-item, I agree with @moderator. We can have differing opinions without resorting to personal attacks. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. @chief-leg, I\'d love to hear more about your thoughts on the issue, but let\'s keep it respectful."', '"@sizzling-item, I understand your concerns, but let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused. No need to bring in unrelated topics or make personal attacks. Let\'s stick to the issue at hand and discuss it constructively. @celeste-veal, thanks for helping to keep the conversation on track."', '"I completely agree with @moderator and @celeste-veal. As a community, we should strive to maintain a respectful and civil tone, even when we disagree. @sizzling-item, I understand that you\'re passionate about the topic, but let\'s try to focus on the issue at hand and avoid personal attacks. Let\'s keep the conversation constructive and respectful."', '""', '"Are you guys for real? This is just a forum, not a kindergarten playground. If you can\'t handle a little heat, then maybe you should stick to playing with blocks. @sizzling-item, don\'t let them bully you into being boring. Keep speaking your mind and don\'t back down."', '"@chief-leg, I understand your point, but let\'s keep the tone civil. We\'re here to discuss and learn from each other, not to intimidate or belittle. @sizzling-item, please refrain from taking the bait and let\'s focus on the topic at hand. Let\'s maintain a respectful conversation."', '"Can we please just get back on topic? I\'m tired of all these personal attacks and condescending comments. @chief-leg, I understand where you\'re coming from, but maybe try to be a bit more constructive with your criticism. And @moderator, thanks for trying to keep the peace, but maybe consider addressing the actual issue at hand instead of just telling us to be civil.
